parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: 'lead_name and lead_email are required. stage must be: new_lead | proposal | onboard', received_stage: $json.stage }) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are an expert B2B automation agency sales qualifier. Always return valid JSON only, no markdown.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Qualify this lead and generate a full outreach sequence.

Lead: ' + $json.lead_name + ', ' + $json.role + ' at ' + $json.company + ' (' + $json.industry + ')
Pain Point: ' + $json.pain_point + '
Budget: ' + $json.budget + '
Service: ' + $json.service_interest + '
Source: ' + $json.source + '

Return JSON with exactly these fields:
{
  "lead_score": (integer 1-10),
  "icp_match": "High or Medium or Low",
  "is_hot": (true if score >= 7, else false),
  "pitch_subject": "compelling email subject for first outreach",
  "pitch_email": "full personalized HTML pitch email body — 150-180 words, professional tone, one clear CTA to book a call. Mention their specific pain point. Sign off as Azmain.",
  "day3_subject": "Day 3 follow-up subject line",
  "day3_email": "HTML Day 3 follow-up — 90 words, softer tone, mention a relevant result or case study angle, one soft CTA",
  "day7_subject": "Day 7 final follow-up subject",
  "day7_email": "HTML Day 7 break-up email — 70 words, respectful, leave the door open",
  "qualification_notes": "2-sentence internal qualification summary for the sales team",
  "recommended_service": "best automation service to pitch based on pain point",
  "estimated_deal_value": "USD range as string e.g. $1500-$3000"
}' }] }) }}

parameters.blocksUi:
={{ JSON.stringify([{type:'section',text:{type:'mrkdwn',text:'🔥 *HOT LEAD — Score ' + $json.lead_score + '/10*
*' + $json.lead_name + '* | ' + $json.role + ' @ ' + $json.company + '
📧 ' + $json.lead_email + '
🏭 Industry: ' + $json.industry + ' | Budget: ' + $json.budget}},{type:'section',fields:[{type:'mrkdwn',text:'*ICP Match:* ' + $json.icp_match},{type:'mrkdwn',text:'*Est. Value:* ' + $json.estimated_deal_value},{type:'mrkdwn',text:'*Best Service:* ' + $json.recommended_service},{type:'mrkdwn',text:'*Pitch Sent:* ✅ ' + $json.timestamp}]},{type:'section',text:{type:'mrkdwn',text:'📝 *Notes:* ' + $json.qualification_notes}}]) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are an expert B2B agency proposal writer. Return valid JSON only.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Write a professional proposal for this prospect.

Client: ' + $json.lead_name + ', ' + $json.role + ' at ' + $json.company + ' (' + $json.industry + ')
Pain: ' + $json.pain_point + '
Budget: ' + $json.budget + '
Service: ' + $json.service_interest + '

Return JSON:
{
  "proposal_subject": "compelling subject for the proposal email",
  "proposal_email": "full HTML proposal email — 400 words: executive summary, 3 specific deliverables, 2-3 week timeline, investment range, ROI statement, clear next step CTA. Professional and confident tone. Sign as Azmain.",
  "deliverable_1": "first deliverable",
  "deliverable_2": "second deliverable",
  "deliverable_3": "third deliverable",
  "timeline_weeks": 2,
  "investment_low": 1500,
  "investment_high": 3000,
  "roi_statement": "one sentence ROI value proposition",
  "next_step": "specific CTA action (e.g. Reply to this email to confirm kickoff)"
}' }] }) }}

parameters.blocksUi:
={{ JSON.stringify([{type:'section',text:{type:'mrkdwn',text:'📄 *PROPOSAL SENT*
*' + $json.lead_name + '* @ ' + $json.company + '
💰 Investment: $' + $json.investment_low + '–$' + $json.investment_high + '
📅 Timeline: ' + $json.timeline_weeks + ' weeks
✅ Next Step: ' + $json.next_step}}]) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are an expert client success manager for an automation agency. Return valid JSON only.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Generate a complete client onboarding package.

Client: ' + $json.lead_name + ', ' + $json.role + ' at ' + $json.company + ' (' + $json.industry + ')
Service: ' + $json.service_interest + '
Pain Point: ' + $json.pain_point + '

Return JSON:
{
  "welcome_subject": "warm and exciting welcome email subject",
  "welcome_email": "full HTML welcome email — 200 words: genuine excitement, exactly what happens next in 3 numbered steps, first deliverable date (5 days from now), link placeholder for kickoff call. Sign as Azmain.",
  "day3_subject": "Day 3 check-in subject line",
  "day3_email": "HTML Day 3 progress email — 100 words: friendly check-in, confirm setup/access, ask if any blockers",
  "day7_subject": "Day 7 milestone celebration subject",
  "day7_email": "HTML Day 7 milestone email — 100 words: celebrate first win, preview what is coming in week 2, keep energy high",
  "checklist_item_1": "first kickoff checklist item",
  "checklist_item_2": "second kickoff checklist item",
  "checklist_item_3": "third kickoff checklist item",
  "checklist_item_4": "fourth kickoff checklist item",
  "first_deliverable_days": 5,
  "slack_announcement": "one-line Slack message to announce this new client to the team"
}' }] }) }}

parameters.blocksUi:
={{ JSON.stringify([{type:'section',text:{type:'mrkdwn',text:'🎉 *NEW CLIENT SIGNED!*
*' + $json.lead_name + '* @ ' + $json.company + '
📧 ' + $json.lead_email + '
🛠️ Service: ' + $json.service_interest + '
📅 First Delivery: Day ' + $json.first_deliverable_days}},{type:'section',text:{type:'mrkdwn',text:'📋 *Kickoff Checklist:*
• ' + $json.checklist_item_1 + '
• ' + $json.checklist_item_2 + '
• ' + $json.checklist_item_3 + '
• ' + $json.checklist_item_4}}]) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, stage: $json.stage, lead: $json.lead_name, company: $json.company, message: 'Agency-in-a-Box: ' + $json.stage + ' flow executed successfully', timestamp: $json.timestamp }) }}

_meta.title: Full Agency-in-a-Box (Lead → Proposal → Onboard)
_meta.description: A single n8n workflow that runs your entire agency pipeline. Send it a lead (stage: new_lead), a warm prospect (stage: proposal), or a closed client (stage: onboard) — it handles AI qualification, personalized email sequences, proposals, client onboarding, logging, and Slack alerts automatically.
credentials_needed: OpenAI API Key (passed in payload as openai_key)

google_sheets_setup.sheet_1: Leads — columns: Timestamp, Lead Name, Email, Company, Role, Industry, Pain Point, Budget, Service, Source, Lead Score, ICP Match, Is Hot, Est. Deal Value, Recommended Service, Qualification Notes
google_sheets_setup.sheet_2: Proposals — columns: Timestamp, Lead Name, Email, Company, Service, Investment Low ($), Investment High ($), Timeline (Weeks), ROI Statement, Next Step, Deliverable 1, Deliverable 2, Deliverable 3
google_sheets_setup.sheet_3: Clients — columns: Timestamp, Client Name, Email, Company, Industry, Service, Pain Point, First Deliverable (Days), Checklist 1, Checklist 2, Checklist 3, Checklist 4

new_lead.pain_point: manually updating CRM after every sales call

proposal.pain_point: manually updating CRM after every sales call

onboard.pain_point: manually updating CRM after every sales call
